Total Tax Paid (all years) {{ formatCurrency(taxSummary.totalPaid) }}
Next Deemed Disposal {{ taxSummary.nextDeemedDisposalDate }}

Tax by Year

Year Profits Losses Net Gain DD Taxable Gain Taxable Gain Tax Due Status Action
{{ row.year }} {{ formatCurrency(row.totalProfits) }} {{ row.totalLosses < 0 ? formatCurrency(row.totalLosses) : '—' }} {{ formatCurrency(row.netGain) }} {{ row.ddTaxableGain > 0 ? formatCurrency(row.ddTaxableGain) : '—' }} {{ formatCurrency(row.taxableGain) }} {{ formatCurrency(row.taxDue) }} {{ row.status }} ✓ Paid

Exit Tax Pots by Year ⓘ For assets subject to Deemed Disposal (Exit Tax)

Asset Year Profits Losses DD Taxable Gain Taxable Gain Tax Due
{{ pot.ticker }} {{ pot.year }} {{ formatCurrency(pot.totalProfits) }} {{ pot.totalLosses < 0 ? formatCurrency(pot.totalLosses) : '—' }} {{ pot.deemedDisposalCreditUsed > 0 ? formatCurrency(pot.deemedDisposalCreditUsed) : '—' }} {{ formatCurrency(pot.netTaxableGain) }} {{ formatCurrency(pot.taxDue) }}

CGT by Year For assets not subject to Deemed Disposal

Year Profits Losses Net Gain Taxable Gain Tax Due (net, after allowance)
{{ row.year }} {{ formatCurrency(row.totalProfits) }} {{ row.totalLosses < 0 ? formatCurrency(row.totalLosses) : '—' }} {{ formatCurrency(row.netGain) }} {{ formatCurrency(row.taxableGain) }} {{ formatCurrency(row.taxDue) }}

CGT losses can offset profits within the same year. They do not carry forward.

CGT by Year

Year Profits Losses Net Gain Allowance Taxable Gain Tax Due (net, after allowance) Status Action
{{ row.year }} {{ formatCurrency(row.totalProfits) }} {{ row.totalLosses < 0 ? formatCurrency(row.totalLosses) : '—' }} {{ formatCurrency(row.netGain) }} {{ row.taxFreeAllowance > 0 ? formatCurrency(row.taxFreeAllowance) : '—' }} {{ formatCurrency(row.taxableGain) }} {{ formatCurrency(row.taxDue) }} {{ row.status }} ✓ Paid
Annual Tax-Free Allowance: {{ formatCurrency(taxSummary.annualTaxFreeAllowance) }}

CGT is settled at year-end — values below are year-level estimates. Use Recalculate to lock in final figures.

{{ row.year }} Gross tax: {{ formatCurrency(row.taxBeforeAllowance) }} Allowance saving: −{{ formatCurrency(row.allowanceApplied) }} After allowance: {{ formatCurrency(row.taxAfterAllowance) }}
Adjusted Total Pending {{ formatCurrency(taxSummary.totalPendingAfterAllowance) }}

No tax events recorded yet. Events appear automatically when sells are made or 8-year deemed disposal rules are triggered.

No tax events recorded yet. Events appear automatically when sells are made.

My Goal

ℹ️ Goal values represent gross projected portfolio value — they do not account for taxes (CGT, Exit Tax, SIA) or inflation. Use the Projections tab for tax- and inflation-adjusted figures.

No goal saved yet.

Go to Projections → ️ Versions and click the button on any version to save it as your goal.
